texto: I had a dream about you
autor: I’ve had multiple dreams about you. If I had to choose between the real you and the dream you then…Goodnight.
explicacao: Citação de I’ve had multiple dreams about you. If I had to choose between the real you and the dream you then…Goodnight. sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “I had a dream about you” articula motivacao, rodney-jenkins, reflexao em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
